sn33.2:1.2: "It is, Vaccha, because of not knowing feeling, its origin, its cessation, and the way leading to its cessation that those various speculative views arise in the world: ‘The world is eternal’ … or ‘The Tathāgatā neither exists nor does not exist after death.’ This, Vaccha, is the cause and reason why those various speculative views arise in the world."
